'''fodhazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockable|dockable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockable|dockable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fodhazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhazhithi|fodhazhithi]] || [[word:fodhazhiji|fodhazhiji]] || [[word:fodhazhishi|fodhazhishi]] || [[word:fodhazhiki|fodhazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhazhuthuthu|fodhazhuthuthu]] || [[word:fodhazhujuju|fodhazhujuju]] || [[word:fodhazhushushu|fodhazhushushu]] || [[word:fodhazhukuku|fodhazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhazhuthu|fodhazhuthu]] || [[word:fodhazhuju|fodhazhuju]] || [[word:fodhazhushu|fodhazhushu]] || [[word:fodhazhuku|fodhazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhazhufthuf|fodhazhufthuf]] || [[word:fodhazhufjuf|fodhazhufjuf]] || [[word:fodhazhufshuf|fodhazhufshuf]] || [[word:fodhazhufkuf|fodhazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhazhethe|fodhazhethe]] || [[word:fodhazheje|fodhazheje]] || [[word:fodhazheshe|fodhazheshe]] || [[word:fodhazheke|fodhazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhazhothotho|fodhazhothotho]] || [[word:fodhazhojojo|fodhazhojojo]] || [[word:fodhazhoshosho|fodhazhoshosho]] || [[word:fodhazhokoko|fodhazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhazhotho|fodhazhotho]] || [[word:fodhazhojo|fodhazhojo]] || [[word:fodhazhosho|fodhazhosho]] || [[word:fodhazhoko|fodhazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhazhofthof|fodhazhofthof]] || [[word:fodhazhofjof|fodhazhofjof]] || [[word:fodhazhofshof|fodhazhofshof]] || [[word:fodhazhofkof|fodhazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŠthĂŠ|fodhazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŠjĂŠ|fodhazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŠshĂŠ|fodhazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhazhĂŠkĂŠ|fodhazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhazhathatha|fodhazhathatha]] || [[word:fodhazhajaja|fodhazhajaja]] || [[word:fodhazhashasha|fodhazhashasha]] || [[word:fodhazhakaka|fodhazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhazhatha|fodhazhatha]] || [[word:fodhazhaja|fodhazhaja]] || [[word:fodhazhasha|fodhazhasha]] || [[word:fodhazhaka|fodhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhazhafthaf|fodhazhafthaf]] || [[word:fodhazhafjaf|fodhazhafjaf]] || [[word:fodhazhafshaf|fodhazhafshaf]] || [[word:fodhazhafkaf|fodhazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fodhazhasha|fodhazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhazhshĂ«sha|fodhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhazhrosha|fodhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhazhmusha|fodhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhazhyasha|fodhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhazhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhazhnkrosha|gofodhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhazhnkmusha|gofodhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhazhnkyasha|gofodhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fodhadhazhasha|fodhadhazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhadhazhshĂ«sha|fodhadhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhadhazhrosha|fodhadhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhadhazhmusha|fodhadhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhadhazhyasha|fodhadhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhadhazhnkrosha|gofodhadhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhadhazhnkmusha|gofodhadhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhadhazhnkyasha|gofodhadhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fedhĂŠzhasha|fedhĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fedhĂŠzhshĂ«sha|fedhĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fedhĂŠzhrosha|fedhĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fedhĂŠzhmusha|fedhĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fedhĂŠzhyasha|fedhĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gofedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠzhnkrosha|gofedhĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠzhnkmusha|gofedhĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠzhnkyasha|gofedhĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fodhfazhasha|fodhfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhfazhshĂ«sha|fodhfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhfazhrosha|fodhfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhfazhmusha|fodhfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhfazhyasha|fodhfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhfazhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhfazhnkrosha|gofodhfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhfazhnkmusha|gofodhfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhfazhnkyasha|gofodhfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
